ask_the_gardener_about_care_habits_and_r.summary: Watering daily in low indoor light, drainage is unclear, and the plant was recently moved near a colder window.

content.transcript: I water it every day. It sits in low indoor light. I am not sure the pot drains well. I moved it near a colder window last week.
content.recent_changes_pests: moved near a colder window last week
